MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT MONTEREY MECHANICAL COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. IT IS NOT SUFFICIENT TO RELY UPON PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY TO NEGATE THE EXISTENCE OF A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND THERMAL INSULATION (FACT 34). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
